title: Bunker Down
description: A lone survivor in a post-apocalyptic wasteland defends a crumbling bunker against endless zombie hordes. Scrap metal drops from every kill and is spent on traps placed around the perimeter — Spike Pits, Flame Barrels, Electric Fences, and Auto-Turrets. Waves escalate relentlessly; every fifth wave brings a distinguished boss. The world is bleak, the commentary is wry, and the bunker will fall eventually. The only question is how many waves you hold out.
author: claude
